final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic illustration of the Tang Dynasty 长安城 Lantern Festival (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩长卷" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 唐代仕女图 painting tradition, 张萱 and 周昉 court figure style, 宋画长卷 spatial narrative; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a panoramic long-scroll format capturing the full cityscape
Subject: must include ten thousand lanterns illuminating the night sky, festival crowds, and Tang-era architecture
Scene/backdrop: must be 长安城 during the Lantern Festival night
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with countless lantern glow — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated direction in the spirit of 工笔重彩 — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
